title: Astrocraft - Custom Planets
description: A resource pack designed to add custom textures to the planets in Astrocraft
body:
This is a resource pack designed for the mod [Astrocraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/astrocraft). This resource pack will not work without it.

This pack is designed to bring new, unique textures to the mod by replacing the standard moon texture with new planet textures to fit their aesthetic.

This pack covers all of the objects that are currently in the mod.
Refer to the gallery to see how these planets look with the new textures.

It's recommended to play using the "big planets" mode turned on, to better see the textures.

# **IMPORTANT**
In order for this resource pack to work, you must go into the mod's config menu

![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b219983d9bd207e26ad90de0c44a6bfccb0cd0b4.png)


Then, change the "Model/Texture" option to the object's name.

![Config Menu properly set up.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/415668cebc237ac4ef771302600c811c3f737bb7.png)

Make sure to do this for every object, including moons.
There are also alternative variants for Venus, Titan, and the Moon. You can configure these by adding "Venus_Clouds", "Titan_Clouds", and "Luna" to their respective objects.

![Gallery of every new texture in the pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f40b8a13662ce4b8f1bd8e755d9133d915d44f85.png)

If for whatever reason you don't like these textures, then its very easy to edit the resource pack manually to add your own planet textures!
